notes: PLAT.INSTAGRAM_HASHTAG_OVER_LIMIT fires when an Instagram package exceeds the configured hashtag count (default 30). The packages are complete image packages (visual_state + media) so the only emitted code is the PLAT.* one; the runner supplies a temp CONTENT_HOME (empty usage-log ⇒ clean cooldown) and no visual-check result (so no PKG.VISUAL_CHECK_* noise).

cases.name: hashtags-over-limit
cases.notes: 31 hashtags across variant bodies, over the 30 limit.

cases.name: clean
cases.notes: Three hashtags, within the limit; complete image package.
